config.github.agent_created_note: Repos created by the agent are always accessible - even without explicit approval.
config.github.allowed_repos_desc: The agent may only access repos explicitly listed here. Repos the agent created itself are always allowed. If the list is empty, the agent may only access repos it created.
config.github.base_url_hint: Only change for GitHub Enterprise. Default: https://api.github.com
config.github.default_private_hint: When active, newly created repos are set as private
config.github.fetch_to_edit_hint: Click Fetch Repos to edit the list
config.github.owner_hint: Your GitHub username or organisation name
config.github.readonly_hint: When active, only read operations are allowed (no repo creation, closing issues, etc.)
config.github.repos_list_empty: Click Fetch Repos to load your GitHub repos
config.github.token_hint: Personal Access Token (PAT) - stored encrypted in the Vault
config.n8n.info_text: n8n can connect to AuraGo as an AI backend. AuraGo can also trigger n8n webhooks on events. The API token protects the AuraGo n8n endpoint — copy it into your n8n credential.
config.n8n.rate_limit_hint: Maximum requests per second from n8n. Set to 0 for unlimited.
config.n8n.readonly_hint: When active, n8n can only read data — no chats, tool execution, or writes.
config.n8n.require_token_hint: Require Bearer token authentication for all n8n requests (strongly recommended).
config.n8n.token_generated: Token generated — copy it now, it won't be shown again
config.n8n.token_hint: Generate a token here and enter it as the Bearer token in your n8n AuraGo credential.
config.n8n.webhook_url_hint: Base URL of your n8n instance for outgoing webhook triggers (e.g. https://n8n.example.com/webhook/).
config.ollama.enabled_help: Enable access to an Ollama instance.
config.ollama.managed_enabled_help: Automatically create and manage a local Ollama Docker container. Requires Docker.
config.ollama.managed_gpu_backend_help: GPU backend for the managed container. Use 'vulkan' for older iGPUs/APUs without ROCm support.
config.ollama.managed_gpu_help: Pass GPU devices into the container for hardware-accelerated inference (Linux only).
config.ollama.managed_memory_help: Docker memory limit for the container, e.g. '8g' or '512m'. Leave empty for unlimited.
config.ollama.managed_models_help: Comma-separated list of models to auto-pull after container start, e.g. llama3,mistral
config.ollama.managed_port_help: Host port for the managed Ollama container (default: 11434).
config.ollama.managed_status_not_found: Container not found — click "Recreate" to create it.
config.ollama.managed_volume_help: Host path for persistent model storage. Leave empty for a Docker-managed volume.
config.ollama.readonly_help: Only allow listing/reading models, block pull/delete/copy.
config.ollama.url_help: Base URL of the Ollama API, e.g. http://localhost:11434

config.section.space_agent.label: Space Agent
config.section.space_agent.desc: Managed Docker sidecar for Space Agent
config.space_agent.disabled_desc: Enable the integration before AuraGo can start it and show it in chat.
config.space_agent.sidecar_note: Runs as a managed Docker sidecar with its own login and vault token.
config.space_agent.advanced_desc: Git, Docker image, and persistence settings.
help.space_agent.enabled: Enables Space Agent and shows it in the chat integrations drawer.
help.space_agent.auto_start: Starts the managed Docker container when AuraGo starts.
help.space_agent.public_url: URL opened from the chat integrations drawer.
help.space_agent.port: Port published on the local network.
help.space_agent.host: Interface for the published port; 0.0.0.0 exposes it on LAN.
help.space_agent.admin_user: Admin user; password is stored only in the vault.
help.space_agent.admin_password: Set or replace the Space Agent login password. It is saved only in the vault; leave it unchanged to keep the existing password.
help.space_agent.repo_url: Git repository used to build Space Agent.
help.space_agent.git_ref: Branch, tag, or commit to build.
help.space_agent.container_name: Name of the managed Docker container.
help.space_agent.customware_path: Host path for AuraGo bridge customware.
